programme.title: Ritoccàti2
programme.desc: PRIMA PARTE - Susanna ha postato una foto fake su una app di incontri ed ora vuole diventare un’altra. Giuseppe ha un problema con le sue misure e chiede un intervento risolutivo. Chiara scopre che il suo uomo la tradisce e chiede un ritocchino per riconquistarlo

programme.title: Storie Di Clinica
programme.desc: Una paziente con cicatrici da acne viene curata utilizzando Morpheus8: una tecnologia di micro-needling frazionato a radiofrequenza. Un’altra paziente si sottopone a rinofiller per perfezionare il profilo nasale dopo una rinoplastica non andata bene.

programme.title: Cuori Ribelli
programme.desc: Un documentario girato tra la Costa d’Avorio e l’Italia che racconta la storia di bambini nati in contesti difficili e affetti da gravi malattie cardiache che trovano una possibilità di salvezza grazie all’impegno di un gruppo di medici italiani

programme.title: SOS Chirurgia
programme.desc: Federica ha 21 anni, dopo un intervento bariatrico ha perso 58 chili ha un seno svuotato. Vuole una mastoplastica additiva per avere, finalmente, il corpo che ha sempre sognato.

programme.title: Bellezza Su Misura
programme.desc: Marzia e Martina sono due giovani amiche che hanno vite molto diverse ma lo stesso desiderio: sottoporsi insieme ad un intervento di mastoplastica additiva per avere finalmente il décolleté che hanno sempre sognato.

programme.title: Il Re Del Bisturi
programme.sub-title: Il Re Del Bisturi | Stagione 1 ep.01
programme.desc: Priscilla ha 21 anni e ha molte insicurezze dovute alla forma del suo naso. Si rivolge al Prof. Basoccu per togliere una gobba e raddrizzare il setto nasale deviato.

programme.title: Sos Cambio Pelle 01
programme.desc: Vi siete mai chiesti com'è la vita di una Dermatologa in carriera? Entriamo nel mondo frenetico e appassionante della Dottoressa Nicoletta. Dalla routine dei controlli periodici ai trattamenti estetici, la nostra Dottoressa affronta ogni sfida con dedizione e competenza.

programme.desc: Vi siete mai chiesti com'è la vita di una Dermatologa in carriera? Entriamo nel mondo frenetico e appassionante della Dottoressa Nicoletta. Dalla routine dei controlli periodici ai trattamenti estetici, la nostra Dottoressa affronta ogni sfida con dedizione e competenza.

programme.title: Storie Di Clinica
programme.desc: Una paziente con cicatrici da acne viene curata utilizzando Morpheus8: una tecnologia di micro-needling frazionato a radiofrequenza. Un’altra paziente si sottopone a rinofiller per perfezionare il profilo nasale dopo una rinoplastica non andata bene.

programme.title: Ritoccàti2
programme.desc: PRIMA PARTE - Susanna ha postato una foto fake su una app di incontri ed ora vuole diventare un’altra. Giuseppe ha un problema con le sue misure e chiede un intervento risolutivo. Chiara scopre che il suo uomo la tradisce e chiede un ritocchino per riconquistarlo

programme.title: Book For Beauty
programme.desc: Nicolò Maltese incontra Giulio Berruti: odontoiatra specializzato in medicina estetica, imprenditore e attore noto del panorama italiano e internazionale. Una voce fuori dal coro capace di smontare cliché e pregiudizi con lucidità (e qualche risata).

programme.title: Il Re Del Bisturi
programme.sub-title: Il Re Del Bisturi | Stagione 1 ep.01
programme.desc: Priscilla ha 21 anni e ha molte insicurezze dovute alla forma del suo naso. Si rivolge al Prof. Basoccu per togliere una gobba e raddrizzare il setto nasale deviato.

programme.title: Il Re Del Bisturi
programme.sub-title: Il Re Del Bisturi | Stagione 1 ep.02
programme.desc: Alessia è una bodybuilder che ama il suo corpo e negli anni si è sottoposta a diversi interventi al seno. Non è soddisfatta quindi si rivolge al Prof. per una mastoplastica risolutiva.

programme.title: SOS Chirurgia
programme.desc: Federica ha 21 anni, dopo un intervento bariatrico ha perso 58 chili ha un seno svuotato. Vuole una mastoplastica additiva per avere, finalmente, il corpo che ha sempre sognato.

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Tout le monde est triste du depart de Yigit. Derya apprend que Selim va bel et bien se marier

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Pour venger le suicide de leur pere, ruine apres le cambriolage de sa bijouterie, deux freres reagissent de facon opposee : l'un choisit le crime et l'autre la justice.

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Yigit est de retour. Emir l'invite a diner. La, il retrouve Kubra et Elif pour la premiere fois depuis tres longtemps. Elif pense que Yigit est son oncle

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Hakki demande a Yigit de lui livrer son frere. Il veut sa peau car tant qu'Emir sera en vie, il ne sera pas tranquille. Il a fait kidnapper Elif pour avoir une monnaie d'echange contre Emir

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Yigit et Emir sont au point de rendez-vous pour proceder a l'echange d'Elif avec Hakki. Mais les choses ne se passent pas comme prevu

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Gul se rapproche de Seyhan afin de donner des informations a Yigit. Selim embrasse Derya. Emir et la police organisent une descente contre Seyhan

programme.desc: Tout le monde est triste du depart de Yigit. Derya apprend que Selim va bel et bien se marier

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Zeliha, une mere de famille, emmenage a Istanbul avec son mari Hasan et leurs deux fils, Yigit et Emir

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Hasan decide d'ouvrir une bijouterie dans le quartier. Namik lui presente Sadullah, un homme tres influent qui pourra l'aider a ouvrir son commerce

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: C'est le jour de l'ouverture de la bijouterie. Malheureusement, la boutique est cambriolee et Hasan est ruine

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Zeliha, une mere de famille, emmenage a Istanbul avec son mari Hasan et leurs deux fils, Yigit et Emir

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Hasan decide d'ouvrir une bijouterie dans le quartier. Namik lui presente Sadullah, un homme tres influent qui pourra l'aider a ouvrir son commerce

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: C'est le jour de l'ouverture de la bijouterie. Malheureusement, la boutique est cambriolee et Hasan est ruine

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: C'est le jour de l'ouverture de la bijouterie. Malheureusement, la boutique est cambriolee et Hasan est ruine

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Emir trouve etrange que la police n'ouvre pas d'enquete sur le cambriolage de la bijouterie. Il estime que Sadullah est responsable de la mort de son pere. Il en parle a son frere, qui decide d'agir

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Apres la mort d'Hasan, Zeliha est completement desoriente. Elle perd la memoire et ne reconnait plus son fils, Emir

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Yigit est enfin libre. De son cote, Emir est toujours loin d'Istanbul pour s'occuper de l'affaire de l'heritage. Son frere lui fait une visite surprise

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: La mere de Sibel pousse sa fille a aller diner avec un jeune homme riche qu'elle a rencontre au travail. Yigit les surprend

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Derya et Sibel deconseillent fortement a Kubra de frequenter Yigit. Malgre tout, la jeune femme accepte quand Yigit l'invite a danser

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Yigit et Emir vont rendre visite a leur mere a la clinique. Malheureusement, celle-ci ne les reconnait pas. Emir et Sibel ont une conversation au sujet de leur relation

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Le beau-pere de Derya tente de l'agresser. Elle parvient a s'echapper et se refugie chez Emir et Yigit

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Yigit apprend que c'est Sadullah qui a informe la compagnie de transport que lui et ses amis allaient devaliser le camion. Il retrouve egalement la trace de Namik

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Yigit prepare un coup contre Sadullah. Une fois son pere sorti, Kubra retrouve Yigit chez lui. Sibel et Bora ont une conversation

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Sibel surprend Yigit en train d'embrasser une autre femme. De son cote, Kubra est prise de nausees

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Kubra explique a Yigit qu'elle ne veut pas se faire avorter. Elle tente de le convaincre de fonder une famille avec elle et leur enfant. Elle va devoir prendre une decision

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Yigit se charge d'enterrer le corps du beau-pere de Derya. Elle essaie d'oublier cet evenement tragique. Malheureusement, la police retrouve le corps

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Kubra surprend Yigit en train d'embrasser Sibel. Elle annonce a Yigit qu'elle n'a finalement pas voulu avorter. Emir subit des pressions de la part de ses superieurs

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Emir et Yigit ont une vive altercation au sujet de Kubra. Quelqu'un a derobe le corps du beau-pere de Derya a la morgue

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Apres avoir decouvert que Sibel avait emmenage avec Bora, Yigit devient fou et part la chercher

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: On a tire sur Yigit, qui est transporte a l'hopital. Sadullah, lui, parvient a s'echapper

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Yigit decouvre que Kubra a accouche d'une petite fille pendant qu'il se trouvait en soins intensifs

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: A la mairie, Emir declare etre le pere de la fille de Kubra. Sadullah parvient a s'echapper de l'endroit ou le retenait monsieur Demir

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Tout le monde se met a la recherche du bebe. Yigit decouvre que Sadullah est implique dans l'enlevement de l'enfant

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Emir et Yigit ramenent le bebe a Kubra. Sadullah est apprehende

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Kubra apprend que son pere est mort. Sibel, elle, rend visite a Yigit dans son appartement

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Sur les conseils de Derya, Kubra decide de reprendre sa vie en main et se met a la recherche d'un travail

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Monsieur Demir tente de retourner Selim contre Yigit. Yigit propose un travail a Derya

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Yigit propose de l'argent a Kubra afin qu'elle puisse louer un appartement decent. Mais elle refuse. Sa fille tombe malade

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Derya commence a travailler pour Yigit. Nihat Demir tombe sous le charme de la jeune femme. Yigit prevoit un voyage a Paris

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Zeliha, une mere de famille, emmenage a Istanbul avec son mari Hasan et leurs deux fils, Yigit et Emir

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: Hasan decide d'ouvrir une bijouterie dans le quartier. Namik lui presente Sadullah, un homme tres influent qui pourra l'aider a ouvrir son commerce

programme.title: Une Question D'Honneur
programme.desc: C'est le jour de l'ouverture de la bijouterie. Malheureusement, la boutique est cambriolee et Hasan est ruine

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: Mel Giedroyc invites four more well-known personalities into the tent. The novice bakers are asked to produce a savoury flan signature bake, a banana and chocolate chip loaf technical and a layered cake with the wow factor for their showstopper. Who will sink and will rise to win?

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: Stepping up to the hotplate to have their baking scrutinized are TV presenter Anita Rani, singer turned fashion designer Pearl Lowe, BBC weatherman Alex Deakin and TV historian and archaeologist Alex Langlands. Who will have what it takes to impress the judges and take the last spot in the final?

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: The competition reaches its climax as the winners of the three heats take on their final challenges. In the signature they’re asked to produce a trio of perfectly baked biscuits, the technical bake uses rough puff pastry and the showstopper is a tiered occasion cake. Who will be crowned champion?

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: Jo Brand, Stephen K Amos and comedy duo Watson and Oliver are the first four to arrive in the tent. Facing signature shortbread as well as a dastardly technical challenge of custard slices and a showstopping portrait cake, they will be tested to the limit. But who will claim tonight's coveted title?

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: Mel Giedroyc welcomes Warwick Davis, Duncan Bannatyne, Simon Reeve and Andy Akinwolere into the tent to try their hand at signature iced biscuits and attempt pastry for the first time. One of them will also bake the smallest cake ever seen in the tent.

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: In this episode, Olympian Ellie Simmonds battles it out with Kirsty Wark, Julia Bradbury and Bob Mortimer over signature scones, technically tricky chocolate eclairs and a show stopping novelty cake. Who will impress the judges enough to claim tonight's title of star baker?

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: In this final episode, Claudia Winkleman, Ed Byrne, Martha Kearney and Olympian Helen Glover try to impress the judges in the last round. The celebrities attempt signature chocolate biscuits, get to grips with a family size lemon meringue pie and create a showstopping birthday cake.

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: Sue Perkins hosts the first episode, in which cricketer Michael Vaughan, James Bond and Downton Abbey actress Samantha Bond, Harry Potter actress Bonnie Wright and broadcaster Johnny Vaughan enter the tent. Who will walk away with the Star Baker Apron?

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: Sue Perkins hands over the baton to Jo Brand to support the next four celebrity bakers. This time the battle is between Desert Island Discs' Kirsty Young, singer and actress Jane Horrocks, Olympic gold-medal winning long jumper Greg Rutherford and ice skating's Mr Nasty, Jason Gardiner

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: Omid Djalili this time and those facing the judges are Olivier award-winning singer Michael Ball, broadcaster and co-founder of Comic Relief Emma Freud, singer and presenter Jamelia and Olympic gold-medallist Victoria Pendleton. But only one can win the Star Baker apron

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: It is Ed Byrne's turn to take up the baking baton and support the four celebrities as they face their three challenges in the tent. The bakers must make pizzas for their signature challenge, eccles cakes in the technical challenge and showstopping tiered cakes that represent sporting equipment.

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: The first brave celebrities to enter the Bake Off Tent are four of the most iconic figures in British entertainment - Joanna Lumley, Jennifer Saunders, Lulu, and Dame Edna Everage - who has come out retirement especially for Comic Relief. They must take on three challenges set by Mary and Paul

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: Mel Giedroyc welcomes four more celebrities into the tent to test out their baking expertise. They are Gok Wan, Jonathan Ross, Abbey Clancy and Zoe Sugg - also known as internet sensation Zoella. Who will impress legendary cookery writer Mary Berry and acclaimed master baker Paul Hollywood?

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: In the third episode Jo Brand welcomes four more celebrities into the tent to lay bare their baking skills. They are David Mitchell, Michael Sheen, Radio 1 DJ Jameela Jamil and Sarah Brown. Tensions are high and confusion is rife, but who will impress and who will miss the mark?

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: Ed Byrne welcomes Victoria Wood, Alexa Chung, Chris Moyles and Kayvan Novak to the tent. They face three tricky challenges set by Mary and Paul.Who will demonstrate baking brilliance and be crowned star baker?

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: Mel Giedroyc hosts featuring Jason Manford, Maddy Hill, David James and Samantha Cameron. contestants face three challenges - making canapes using rough puff pastry, preparing a Paris-Brest, a French dessert, and finally, creating a 3D cake in the shape of a sporting trophy.

programme.title: Baking Show The Professionals
programme.sub-title: Baking Show The Professionals Season 9 episode 7
programme.desc: The competition is about to get even tougher for the teams as the search for Britain’s best pastry chefs continues into the Final Six. The best three teams from each set of heats come together in this chocolate fuelled episode as they continue in their pursuit to reach the final.

programme.title: Baking Show The Professionals
programme.sub-title: Baking Show The Professionals Season 9 episode 8
programme.desc: It’s the quarter finals, and the five remaining teams create a plated dessert for each of the judges, which celebrates caramel. For their second challenge, the teams will have 5 hours to create a display of frozen lollipops, within a delicate sugar sculpture inspired by the theme Winter Wonderland.

programme.title: Baking Show The Professionals
programme.sub-title: Baking Show The Professionals Season 9 episode 9
programme.desc: The semi-final and if the four remaining teams thought it had been tough so far then they are going to need to brace themselves for what’s in store. World renowned sugar expert and guest judge Nicolas Houchet, Executive Pastry Chef at the iconic 5-star hotel, The Savoy, will set their first challenge.

programme.title: Baking Show The Professionals
programme.sub-title: Baking Show The Professionals Season 9 episode 10
programme.desc: The search for Britain’s best pastry chefs reaches its conclusion in the grand finale. The remaining three teams pour all their patisserie passion and expertise into two epic final challenges, where nothing less than brilliance will be good enough at this stage of the competition.

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: The bakers on the starting line are former Labour politician Ed Balls, writer and presenter Victoria Coren Mitchell, sports commentator Chris Kamara and singer and actress Kimberley Walsh. Who will bag the coveted title of star baker?

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: The celebrities taking up the baking baton this time are ex-Spice Girl Geri Horner, BBC world affairs editor John Simpson, footballer and pundit Jermaine Jenas and 1990s pop sensation Louise Redknapp.Who will crumble under the pressure and who will triumph to take home the title of Star Baker?

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: The celebrities taking up the baking baton this time are actor Alison Steadman, comedian Ade Edmondson, singer Will Young and actor and comedian Morgana Robinson. Which of the bakes will measure up to the exacting standards of the judges and win them the coveted Star Baker apron?

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: The first four brave celebrities ushered into the tent by presenters Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding are comedian Harry Hill, Spandau Ballet’s Martin Kemp, actress and writer Roisin Conaty and veteran broadcaster Bill Turnbull. They’re all donning their aprons to raise money

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: In this episode, Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig invite four more celebrities to the tent to test their baking skills. They are Countdown’s Nick Hewer, singer and tv personality Stacey Solomon, The Kaiser Chiefs’ Ricky Wilson and dance troupe Diversity’s Perri Kiely.

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: In this episode, Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig invite four more celebrities to the tent to test their baking skills. They are Countdown’s Nick Hewer, singer and tv personality Stacey Solomon, The Kaiser Chiefs’ Ricky Wilson and dance troupe Diversity’s Perri Kiely.

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: In this episode, Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding welcome four more celebrities into the tent to expose their soggy bottoms. They are musical comedian Tim Minchin, leader of the Scottish Conservative party Ruth Davidson, Made In Chelsea star Jamie Laing, and singer Ella Eyre.

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: In the fourth episode, four more celebrities battle it out in the tent. Presenters Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig are joined by celebrity bakers comedian Lee Mack, writer and actor Griff Rhys Jones, tv presenter Melanie Sykes and comedian Joe Lycett.

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: In the fifth episode, the final four celebrities step into the tent. Presenters Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig warmly welcome celebrity bakers, tv host Alan Carr, comedian Aisling Bea, Paralympian Kadeena Cox and all the way from the U.S, award-winning actor and author Teri Hatcher.

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: The first four celebrities welcomed into the tent by presenters Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding are Hollywood star John Lithgow, comedian Jon Richardson, Paralympian Hannah Cockroft and outrageous funnyman Russell Brand. They’re all donning their aprons to raise money.

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: Four more celebrities battle it out in the tent. Presenters Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig are joined by funnyman James Acaster, stage and screen actor Russell Tovey, TV presenter Rylan Clark-Neal and actress Michelle Keegan. They’re all baking to raise money and one will win the star baker apron

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: In this episode, Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding welcome four more celebrities into the Bake Off tent to expose their soft centres. They are comedian Johnny Vegas, grime artist Big Narstie, Olympian Katarina Johnson-Thompson, and Labour MP Jess Phillips.

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: In this episode, Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig invite four more celebrities into the tent to showcase their baking skills. They are broadcaster, author and journalist Jeremy Paxman, award-winning comedian Joe Wilkinson, actress Sally Lindsay and reality star and presenter Georgia Toffolo.

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: In the fifth episode, the final four celebrities take on the tent. Presenters Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig warmly welcome journalist and news presenter Krishnan Guru-Murthy, tv presenter Caroline Flack, actor Greg Wise and Britain’s most successful female boxer Nicola Adams

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: The celebrity bakers take on three challenges set by judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith. The first is a Giant Biscuit, followed by a classic bake for the technical then a choux sculpture showstopper depicting the celebrity’s perfect day.

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: Four more celebrities battle it out in the tent. Presenters Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig are joined by Hollywood actor Richard Dreyfuss, actors Patsy Palmer and James Buckley and TV personality Scarlett Moffatt

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: In this episode of The Celebrity Baking Show, Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding welcome four more celebrities into the tent. They are Fashion Designer Tan France, Actor Caroline Quentin, comedian Joel Dommett and British Tennis Number one tennis player Johanna Konta.

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: In this episode Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig invite four more celebrities into the tent to showcase their baking skills. They are singer James Blunt, TV presenters Alison Hammond and Alex Jones, and YouTuber Joe Sugg. they’re all baking to raise money and win the Star Baker apron.

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: In the fifth and final episode Presenters Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig welcome TV personality Carol Vorderman, Radio presenter Kelly Brook, TV Judge Rob Rinder and Comedian Mo Gilligan. But only one of the celebrity bakers can win the star baker accolade.

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: First up, in this episode are Star Wars actor Daisy Ridley, comedian Rob Beckett, popstar Alexandra Burke and comedian Tom Allen. They tackle millionaire shortbread in the signature, a fruity tart in the technical and create their pet hates in cake form in an ambitious showstopper

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: Matt Lucas welcomes four more celebrities into the nation’s favourite tent. They are actor James McAvoy, popstar Anne-Marie, comedian David Baddiel and Olympian Dame Kelly Holmes. These four celebrities will have to pull out all the stops to claim the Star Baker apron.

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: Matt Lucas is joined by MC Dizzee Rascal, radio DJ Nick Grimshaw, psychiatrist and author Phillipa Perry and comedian Reece Shearsmith. They’re baking to inspire viewers to do the same, and to raise money for charity.

programme.title: Baking Show The Professionals
programme.sub-title: Baking Show The Professionals Season 1 Episode 1
programme.desc: Battling it out in the first heat are three young chefs from a five star hotel: a team which invents desserts for a leading supermarket: and a trio of chefs who work in secret restaurants hidden away in the City of London

programme.title: Baking Show The Professionals
programme.sub-title: Baking Show The Professionals Season 1 Episode 2
programme.desc: Tom Kerridge welcomes three more teams of expert chefs to the competition. In the second heat of this incredible bake off, a team from the British Armed Forces meet the only all-women team in the competition and a team from a world-famous London hotel

programme.title: Baking Show The Professionals
programme.sub-title: Baking Show The Professionals Season 1 Episode 3
programme.desc: The search for the best of British pastry continues with Tom Kerridge welcoming three more teams of expert chefs to the competition for the third heat out of five. The teams are asked to reinvent a classic British dessert, lemon meringue pie, as a fine-dining experience

programme.title: Baking Show The Professionals
programme.sub-title: Baking Show The Professionals Season 1 Episode 4
programme.desc: Competing in this episode are a cookery school teacher with two of his former star pupils, a trio of pastry chefs from a 5 star London hotel and the only all French outfit in the competition who work in a high-end patisserie. The teams musts produce St Marc slices, sfogliatelle and small domed cakes.

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: In this episode of Celebrity Baking Show Matt Lucas invites four more celebrities into the tent to showcase their baking skills for charity. They are journalist and presenter Stacey Dooley, Little Mix's Jade Thirlwall, internet personality KSI and comedian Katherine Ryan.

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: In the fifth and final episode Lucas welcomes TV presenter Anneka Rice, comedian John Bishop, popstar Nadine Coyle and sportsman and TV presenter Ade Adepitan into the tent. Only one of the celebrity bakers can claim the winner’s apron but they all have the chance to raise money for charity.

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: Emma Willis, Clara Amfo, Blake Harrison and Alex Horne take on decorated biscuits, madeleines and a showstopping choux sculpture that embodies their secret talent. The celebs will have to pull out all the stops to claim the Star Baker apron

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: Ruby Wax, Gareth Malone, Laura Whitmore and Yung Filly take on Signature fruit turnovers, a chocolate fondant Technical and relive embarrassing moments in a meringue Showstopper

programme.title: Celebrity Baking Show
programme.desc: Baking Show's very own Matt Lucas joins Annie Mac, Ed Gamble and Example as they make Signature stained-glass biscuits and showstopping cakes that depict what they did before they were famous

programme.title: Unsupersize Me
programme.desc: Unsupersize Me documents the inspiring story of personal trainer Juan-Carlos Asse and his quest to prove that a whole foods, plant based diet coupled with an exercise regimen is capable of remarkably improving the health of any and every individual.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: John Comack, owner of Green Energy Technology, a company specializing in EV charging stations, seeks funding to expand his business. With a vision for growth and a turnkey solution approach, John impresses the panel with his strategic mindset and grasp of the market.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: Dan Notartomaso seeks $650,000 in funding for his companies, Peak Custom Construction and Oak and Iron Design Co. As Dan unveils his unique niche in high-end home remodels catering to professional athletes, the panel of experts delve into his ambitious plans and financial challenges. With rapid growth during the pandemic, Dan grapples with cash flow issues and the need for strategic investment.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.sub-title: Fund Tank - Teach Your Heart Out
programme.desc: Mother-daughter duo Tosha Wright and Lisa Dunnigan from Teach Your Heart Out seek $600,000 in funding to propel their educational conference business to new heights. With a mission to rejuvenate and empower educators nationwide, they share their inspiring journey and ambitious plans with the panel of experts. Despite facing challenges such as the impact of COVID-19 on educational conferences and the need for strategic expansion, Tosha and Lisa impress with their passion and dedication to their cause.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: Dr. Don Wood, CEO and founder of the Inspired Performance Institute, seeks funding to scale his groundbreaking trauma resolution program. With a mission to revolutionize mental health treatment, Dr. Wood's program, TIPP, boasts a remarkable 90% success rate in alleviating post-traumatic stress, anxiety, and depression. Rooted in his personal journey to save his daughter from chronic illness, Dr. Wood's method resets the mind's response to trauma, yielding rapid and lasting results in just four hours. Despite financial challenges, Dr. Wood's vision to reach millions drives his pursuit of strategic partnerships and media exposure, highlighting the transformative potential of his innovative approach to healing.

programme.title: The Wright Turn
programme.sub-title: The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: La Dolce Vita (Sweet Life) - Ten years after the divorce from Maxwell Turner, with children grown, Celeste Wright Turner makes a choice to start living her life. No SEX with the EX! Simon and Mimi try to get Celeste’s head on straight when it comes to Maxwell’s charm. After facing an emotional challenge, Celeste decides to take a trip abroad.

programme.title: The Wright Turn
programme.sub-title: The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down
programme.desc: London Bridges Burning Down - Breakdowns are inevitable when Celeste tries to run from her past. Her therapist gives Celeste sound advice on how to spice up her sex life.

programme.title: The Wright Turn
programme.sub-title: The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up
programme.desc: Butter Me Up - Celeste returns back to Los Angeles after her journey. Her friends throw her a sex toy birthday party. When an old flame comes back, can he melt her butter? Nikki reveals a trauma from her childhood.

programme.title: The Wright Turn
programme.sub-title: The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace
programme.desc: Pearl Necklace - Can a long-desired gift bring Max and Celeste closer together? While Father Cross’s guilty pleasure is exposed, leaving a young family member seeking revenge and Celeste on his trail. A Fundraiser brings Maddy back to the stage with new comic material on the stage of Denim & Diamonds fundraiser for Autism Care Today.

programme.title: Pull Up The Curtain with G Souldier
programme.sub-title: Pull Up The Curtain - Ali of The St. Lunatics
programme.desc: An In-Depth interview with Ali. Talks Nelly, The St. Lunatics, Music Career, and St. Louis

programme.sub-title: Pull Up The Curtain - Albe Back

programme.title: Research Detectives
programme.desc: Gives viewers an inside look at the tremendous scientific effort involved in finding effective treatments for Dementia and Alzheimer's Disease.

programme.title: Research Detectives
programme.desc: One of the cleverest ways cancer cells survive is by evading detection from the immune system forces that would otherwise destroy them. In this new episode of Research Detectives, we go inside the laboratory with the scientists who are working to outsmart the cancer cells and expose them. Plus, we take a look at medications and treatments that could force the cancer cells to destroy themselves.

programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your Day 1 practice offers an invitation to slow down and take stock.

programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your Day 2 session invites you to use the tools of the at-home yoga practice to befriend your body and your breath. Build on the art of noticing from Day 1 as we expand our vocabulary with a focus on a strong foundation. This session encourages a healthy flow of energy up and down the spine and lovingly guides you to learn how to take responsibility for your experience on the mat.

programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your day 3 practice invites you to get to know your body through the structure of the practice and the art of aligning. We build on day 1 and 2 with a focus on action and alignment through asana and energy.

programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your Day 4 practice provides you the opportunity to lean in when you feel discomfort to embrace the process of finding ease. Discover layers of your home practice as we look at our patterns and continue to build a dynamic vocabulary that serves.

programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your day 5 practice introduces principles of stability or Sthira. Though this practice we learn to to steady the mind as we strengthen the body. Build on yesterday’s practice to marry effort with ease. Invite your breath to be smooth and even as we continue to build on your foundation.

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson
programme.sub-title: Relationships: Relationships and Your Spiritual Journey
programme.desc: Today's lesson is a bit of a reality check, as we'll begin to question the current way we look at relationships, romantic or not. How we see ourselves and our relationship to God influences our view of our relationships with other people. Today we're going to examine that view from a place of love.

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson
programme.sub-title: Relationships: How to Have Miraculous Relationships
programme.desc: A miracle happens when you stop thinking with fear and start thinking with love. Your greatest power lies in your mind. To establish stronger connections, you need to go into every situation requesting to be an instrument of love. When you approach your interactions with love, you'll begin to have more miraculous relationships.

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson
programme.desc: In the following lesson, we'll discover how the ego mind influences both our way of thinking and our relationships. We'll also identify the unconscious barriers we've built that cause us to form these judgments and thoughts. That's where the problem is, and that's where the solution lies.

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson
programme.sub-title: Relationships: Relationships Are Opportunities for Growth
programme.desc: The focus of today's lecture is this: atonement. While we decided to act a certain way in the past based on our personality, we can now use this information to improve our current and future relationships.

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson
programme.desc: To truly grasp the concept of forgiveness, we have to be willing to see past the person's mistakes. The benefit we get from being more forgiving isn't that other people are going to be more forgiving towards us, it's that it won't affect us when they aren't.

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson
programme.desc: In this lesson, we'll discover the significance of holy relationships. After all, souls are brought together for the purpose of enlightenment.

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie
programme.desc: As humans, we are constantly struggling between the poles of what we think we want and what is. When we lose touch with the truth of what is, we create and compound our suffering. What narratives are you constructing? Are they in conflict with the truth of the situation? Are you struggling with what is?

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie
programme.desc: The way you recall a memory and the way it actually happened might be completely different. The question is, do you know which version feeds you? We can become so wrapped up in our recollections, we convince ourselves of these untruths. Is that person a monster? Were they wishing you harm? Or were they dealing with a difficult situation in the best way they knew how?

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie
programme.desc: Stop focusing on the object of your desires and start focusing on the reason for desiring that object in the first place. When you turn it around, you may find that what you really want is completely different than what you’ve been telling yourself.

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie
programme.sub-title: My Mom Didn't Fight for Me
programme.desc: A single thought plants the seed of a narrative. You feel lonely and unsupported, so, of course, someone must have abandoned you. Over time, the thought “I feel abandoned” grows into the story of an entire childhood. Let’s uproot the thought and untangle the story.

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie
programme.sub-title: My Husband Doesn't Want Me as a Business Partner
programme.desc: Fear is a fickle partner. While it certainly serves a purpose — keeping us out of danger and forcing us to question our assumptions — if we give too much of ourselves over to fear, it will lead us down paths filled with insecurity, broken social interactions, and a persistent struggle against the way things actually are.

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie
programme.sub-title: I Don't Trust I'll Find Someone to Create a Life With
programme.desc: Definitive statements are comforting. They give life structure and clear direction. But what happens when your declarations are at odds with your subconscious desires?

programme.title: Help Wanted
programme.desc: HELP WANTED is the story of an immigrant mechanic stuck in a middle-age malaise who learns to re-appreciate his life through the eyes of a confident new employee.

programme.title: Help Wanted
programme.desc: HELP WANTED is the story of an immigrant mechanic stuck in a middle-age malaise who learns to re-appreciate his life through the eyes of a confident new employee.

programme.title: Play To Win

programme.title: Sex Talk
programme.sub-title: Sex Talk - It’s Alright to Talk About Sex
programme.desc: A man gets terrible headaches right at the height of passion. And a woman won’t talk about her sexual desires. What should her partner do? All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.

programme.title: Sex Talk
programme.sub-title: Sex Talk - Is There Really a G Spot?
programme.desc: A man wonders if he should look for love while his wife battles dementia and the classic tale of the G spot gets a rewriting. This week on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.

programme.title: Sex Talk
programme.sub-title: Sex Talk - The Benefits of Testosterone
programme.desc: A man falls asleep during sex. Is it a medical emergency? And could testosterone gel be the cure for painful sex in seniors? All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.

programme.title: The Aware Show
programme.sub-title: The Aware Show: Dr Jill Bolte Taylor - Whole Brain Living and Choice
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Dr Jill Bolte Taylor, a Harvard-trained and published neuroanatomist. She shares with us the idea of cellular circuitry and how there are four distinct modules of cells that make up who we are, combining the thinking mind and the emotional side. She discusses her new book, Whole Brain Living: The Anatomy of Choice and the Four Characteristics that Drive Our Life.

programme.title: Dr. Q&A
programme.desc: Stomach aches and pains are a common complaint. Here are the signs that the problem could be serious.

programme.title: Dr. Q&A
programme.desc: Back pain is one of the most common conditions today but there are treatments, exercises, and therapies that can relieve the pain that don’t involve either narcotics or surgery. But if those interventions are needed you want to make sure you have what you need to make an informed decision

programme.title: Dr. Q&A
programme.sub-title: Dr. Q&A - Alzheimer's Disease: Hope For The Future
programme.desc: Alzheimer’s disease affects millions of people around the world, robbing them of their memory and of so much of their lives. There is still no sure but there are some treatments and active clinical trials that are offering promise. In this program, we discuss some of the lifestyle changes people can make to help prevent or at least slow down the progression of Alzheimer’s and stay as mentally healthy as possible.

programme.title: Dr. Q&A
programme.sub-title: Dr. Q&A - A Plastic Surgeon Answers Your Questions
programme.desc: Think you need a little nip or tuck? Want answers about fillers or Botox? Need advice about hair loss ? Our expert talks about all that and much more. Plus he highlights a new procedure that can help people who have had suffered traumatic injuries to their limbs.

programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your day 6 practice invites you to use core work to get clear. In this session we use controlled movement to activate the muscles of the abdominal for a strong and healthy back and strengthen your whole self.

programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your Day 7 practice is an invitation right to the good stuff. This fiery session is a warming sequence that guides to you create a healthy flow of energy in the body welcoming total mind and body health.

programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your day 9 practice asks you to check in with body and breath as a way of cultivating more awareness. The journey continues! The vocabulary grows. Move fearlessly through this practice by simply listening to your body. Check your habits and move with intention as a way of moving forward with confidence and focus.

programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your day 10 practice starts with a standing warm up and eases into a yoga flow for balance and transformation! Bring calm alertness to the mind and body as you continue to ride the wave of the breath. Build a strong foundation to set yourself up for greatness. Be patient and courageous.

programme.title: Good Morning Joy
programme.desc: Founder, Glenn Marsden, of Imperfectly Perfect Campaign, and Jeremy Jackson, former Baywatch star share their personal journeys with body dysmorphia and how it led to a worldwide campaign. A young man faces his fears and a tale of kindness at 30,000 ft.

programme.title: Good Morning Joy

programme.title: Good Morning Joy

programme.title: Good Morning Joy

programme.sub-title: 1. 5 Ways to Become Rooted in Wellness
programme.desc: In our very first solo episode of Rooted in Wellness, we explore the transformative power of being anchored like a sturdy tree—steady, grounded, and unwavering amidst life's storms. We'll illuminate how feeling rooted manifests as inner peace, emotional stability, and a profound connection with yourself and the world around you.

programme.title: Rooted In Wellness

programme.title: FourWheeler
programme.desc: Larger tires on an off-road rig usually mean broken axles; a 1989 Dodge Ram Charger is in the shop; Ian shows how to swap out a semi-float axle for the more desirable full-float axle.

programme.title: I soldati dell'imperatore
programme.desc: Negli anni di governo della dinastia Qing, l'imperatore Yong Zheng istituisce una squadra segreta di assassini, noti come le Ghigliottine, per eliminare tutti coloro che si oppongono al suo potere. L'ascesa al trono del nuovo imperatore Qian Long, aperto a idee più occidentali e alla tecnologia, porterà la squadra a instaurare un regno di terrore e oppressione nella regione degli Han.

programme.title: General Commander
programme.desc: Thriller drammatico con il grande Steven Seagal. Un agente segreto ha visto morire uno dei suoi uomini durante un'operazione. Deciso a vendicarsi contro Orsini, il capo mafioso responsabile della morte del collega, non ha il sostegno della CIA ed è costretto a formare una squadra tutta sua.

programme.title: Chicago Overcoat - Il killer di Chicago
programme.desc: Adrenalinico gangster movie con protagonista Frank Vincent (Phil Leotardo in “I Soprano”). Dopo esser stato per decenni il miglior killer di Chicago, Lou Marazano è passato alla storia della malavita per non aver mai lasciato una traccia dietro ai suoi crimini. Ora, a 60 anni, la gloria è ormai lontana, ma Lou ha bisogno di soldi per trasferirsi con l'amata Lorraine lontano dalla città, e accetta di far un grosso favore al boss Stefano D'Agostino.

programme.title: Off-Piste
programme.desc: Un ex militare recluso, che vive tra le montagne della Francia per sfuggire a un passato traumatico, viene braccato da coloro a cui ha distrutto la vita.

programme.title: La Vendetta di Viktor
programme.desc: Dopo aver scontato sette anni di prigione in Francia per una rapina finita male, Viktor Lambert ritorna a Mosca, determinato a scoprire i colpevoli del brutale omicidio di suo figlio Jeremy, avvenuto tre mesi prima, e proseguire nel proprio disegno di vendetta.

programme.title: Ticket Out - Giustizia ad ogni costo
programme.desc: Una donna si vuole trasferire in un altro paese con i due figli per fuggire dall'ex marito violento. Braccata dall'uomo e dai federali, la donna chiede aiuto a Jim, un agente che lavora per una rete sotterranea che aiuta coniugi in difficoltà e in fuga da compagni violenti che si trasformano in potenziali assassini.

programme.title: Thrill Of The Kill - Il profumo della paura
programme.desc: Sconvolta dalla morte violenta della sorella, Kelly Holden si rivolge ad un celebre scrittore di gialli, Graydon Jennings, in cerca di aiuto. La mossa, purtroppo, si rivela presto sbagliata.

programme.title: Homecoming: vendetta e seduzione
programme.desc: Mike vive in una cittadina in cui il football è tutto e gioca nella squadra locale. Ottenuta una borsa di studio si trasferisce alla Northwestern University. Tornato per le vacanze di Natale, tutti restano sorpresi nel vedere la sua nuova fidanzata Elizabeth. Tra tutti la più sconvolta è Shelby (Mischa Barton), l'ex ragazza di Mike, che vede in Elizabeth una pericolosa rivale.

programme.title: Carjacked - La strada della paura
programme.desc: Prossima al divorzio e in lotta per l'affidamento del figlio Chad, l'insicura Lorraine è sequestrata a bordo della sua auto assieme al bambino, da Roy (Stephen Dorff), un rapinatore che vorrebbe fuggire verso il Messico.

programme.title: L'ombra del dubbio
programme.desc: La figlia di un miliardario viene uccisa nella sua casa di Los Angeles. Per la difesa del sospettato viene incaricata Kitt Devereux, un'avvocatessa decisa e brillante. L'accusa viene sostenuta da Jack Campioni, un ambizioso procuratore distrettuale ed ex marito di Kitt. Il caso si rivelerà più complicato e rischioso del previsto.

programme.title: Una bionda tutta d'oro
programme.desc: Uscita dal carcere Karen McCoy, un'abile ladra di Atlanta, cerca di ricostruirsi una vita normale. Viene invece costretta a partecipare a una rapina in una banca superprotetta.

programme.title: Looking Glass - Oltre lo specchio
programme.desc: Una coppia acquista un vecchio motel nel deserto in cerca di una nuova vita, ma quella che all'inizio sembra una fuga diviene presto un incubo, quando Ray scopre uno specchio a due vie e assiste a un orribile omicidio. Da quel momento, Ray deve fuggire per salvare sua moglie e se stesso da un raccapricciante segreto collegato al motel, e alle strane persone che lo frequentano.

programme.title: The Runner - Il Prezzo del Potere
programme.desc: Un politico corrotto (Nicolas Cage) finisce nei guai a causa di uno scandalo a sfondo sessuale. In seguito alla fuoriuscita di petrolio della piattaforma petrolifera Deepwater, cercherà riscatto e di trovare un modo per ridare vigore alla sua vita personale e politica, infangata da corruzione, scandali e inganni.

programme.title: Cane mangia cane
programme.desc: Dal romanzo di Edward Bunker, con Nicholas Cage, Willem Dafoe e Christopher Matthew Cook. Tre ex detenuti accettano un incarico da parte di uno dei capi della criminalità organizzata messicana: rapire il figlio del boss di una banda rivale. Quando sono costretti a uccidere il padre del ragazzino, Troy, Mad Dog e Diesel intraprendono una fuga per evitare il carcere.

programme.title: Offspring
programme.desc: La piccola cittadina di Dead River è sconvolta da una serie di omicidi, perpetrati dalla discendenza di una banda di cannibali risalente al 1858. Le indagini vengono affidate all'ex sceriffo George Chandler, esperto del modus operandi dei selvaggi. L'obiettivo dei cannibali è solo uno: rapire il figlio dei coniugi Halbard per allevarlo e assicurare così la sopravvivenza della terribile specie.

programme.title: The Presence
programme.desc: In una casa che sorge tra i boschi di una piccola isola si aggira un’oscura e misteriosa presenza che, come per gelosia, diviene particolarmente minacciosa quando una donna (Mira Sorvino), giunta sul posto per ritrovare la serenità perduta, riceve la visita del proprio fidanzato. In un susseguirsi di eventi sempre più sconvolgenti, la coppia dovrà affrontare questa oscura presenza.

programme.title: The Presence
programme.desc: In una casa che sorge tra i boschi di una piccola isola si aggira un’oscura e misteriosa presenza che, come per gelosia, diviene particolarmente minacciosa quando una donna (Mira Sorvino), giunta sul posto per ritrovare la serenità perduta, riceve la visita del proprio fidanzato. In un susseguirsi di eventi sempre più sconvolgenti, la coppia dovrà affrontare questa oscura presenza.

programme.title: Il trafficante - Beast of burden
programme.desc: Il pilota Sean Haggerty (Daniel Radcliffe) deve compiere l'ultima consegna di cocaina come trafficante di droga, volando attraverso il confine USA-Messico. Ai comandi di un piccolo aereo, in solitaria, si troverà di fronte al peso di scegliere tra la fedeltà al Cartello, il suo accordo con la DEA e il rapporto sempre più teso con la moglie, in attesa del suo ritorno.

programme.title: Sacrifice
programme.desc: Action thriller adrenalinico con Cuba Gooding Jr. e Christian Slater. Un poliziotto che opera sotto copertura si trova inaspettatamente coinvolto in un pericoloso traffico di droga. Durante un'indagine un giovane spacciatore affida al poliziotto una bambina di cinque anni. Sarà l'inizio di numerosi colpi di scena che porteranno a delle conseguenze inaspettate.

programme.title: The River Murders - Vendetta di sangue
programme.desc: Thriller interpretato da Ray Liotta, Christian Slater e Ving Rhames. Il detective Jack Verdon indaga sullo stupro e sull'omicidio della sua ex fidanzata, e sulle altre donne del suo passato che sono state uccise in circostanze simili. Mentre dà la caccia al sadico criminale, i colleghi iniziano a nutrire dei forti sospetti su di lui.

programme.title: Svolta pericolosa
programme.desc: Un crime ad alta tensione con protagonisti Bill Paxton, Mark Wahlberg e Julianna Margulies, in cui un artista della truffa insegna a un nuovo arrivato le regole per far parte di una banda di criminali.

programme.title: Gamer
programme.desc: Un perverso gioco di ruolo ambientato in un futuro spietato, dove il sistema penitenziario e quello sanitario sono allo stremo e dove la tecnologia controlla le menti dei giocatori. Giocatori che in caso di 30 vittorie possono diventare liberi.

programme.title: The runners
programme.desc: Dopo la morte dei genitori, Ryan si ritrova a crescere da solo la sorella adolescente Zoe, ribelle e difficile da gestire. Quando una sera lei scompare dopo una festa, Ryan scopre che è stata rapita da una rete criminale internazionale. Inizia così una corsa contro il tempo per salvarla prima che venga inghiottita dal mondo oscuro del traffico sessuale.

programme.title: The Runner - Il Prezzo del Potere
programme.desc: Un politico corrotto (Nicolas Cage) finisce nei guai a causa di uno scandalo a sfondo sessuale. In seguito alla fuoriuscita di petrolio della piattaforma petrolifera Deepwater, cercherà riscatto e di trovare un modo per ridare vigore alla sua vita personale e politica, infangata da corruzione, scandali e inganni.

programme.title: The Whistleblower
programme.desc: Ispirato a fatti reali, Kathryn (Rachel Weisz), agente di polizia del Nebraska, decide di unirsi alle forze di pace dell'ONU nella Bosnia post-guerra. Arrivata sul campo, scopre un enorme giro di traffico sessuale e inizia a indagare. Tra omertà, minacce e complicità ai più alti livelli, Kathryn porterà alla luce una verità scomoda e scioccante.

programme.title: Il Legionario - Fuga all'inferno
programme.desc: Film storico e d'azione che vanta tra i protagonisti il grande Mickey Rourke. Primo secolo avanti Cristo, durante l'invasione della Partia, due legioni romane sono bloccate fra le montagne innevate dell'Armenia e rischiano di morire lentamente di freddo. Sarà Noreno, soldato per metà romano, ad avere l'arduo compito di attraversare le montagne per chiedere aiuto.

programme.title: Operation Chromite
programme.desc: Settembre 1950. Le forze delle Nazioni Unite, guidate dal generale MacArthur, sono in procinto di invadere e riconquistare la Corea del Sud, nella città portuale di Incheon. Tuttavia, la cosiddetta Operazione Chromite è piena di rischi e ha un'alta probabilità di fallimento. Per evitare che ciò accada, MacArthur invia una squadra di otto spie coreane a Incheon.

programme.title: Wolf Warrior 2
programme.desc: L'action Movie con il più alto incasso di tutti i tempi in oriente. Leng Feng è un ex combattente dell'unità operativa speciale dei Wolf Warriors che si trova ora in Africa a difendere le navi contro gli attacchi dei pirati. Cerca così di provare a dimenticare il dolore per la morte della sua fidanzata. Riuscirà presto a sfogare la sua sete di vendetta verso gli ignoti assassini.

programme.title: I soldati dell'imperatore
programme.desc: Negli anni di governo della dinastia Qing, l'imperatore Yong Zheng istituisce una squadra segreta di assassini, noti come le Ghigliottine, per eliminare tutti coloro che si oppongono al suo potere. L'ascesa al trono del nuovo imperatore Qian Long, aperto a idee più occidentali e alla tecnologia, porterà la squadra a instaurare un regno di terrore e oppressione nella regione degli Han.

programme.title: La spada e la rosa
programme.desc: Un'antica profezia racconta che un giovane uomo sarà capace di sovvertire l'ordine del regno fantastico di Huadu, dove una temibile imperatrice ha assoggettato gli uomini rendendoli schiavi e reso le donne spietate combattenti. Quando Char giungerà a Huadu, la sovrana capirà che la profezia sta per divenire realtà e farà di tutto per fermare il giovane.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.desc: Jazmine, Jenny and Janey are here hoping to repair the scar tissue from some very deep wounds.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: DNA: Stop Denying Your Daughter!; Unlock: I Can Smell the Cheating
programme.desc: Lizzy says that every time she breaks up with her boyfriend, Heem, he denies being the father of her daughter; accused of infidelity, Dennis says he suspects that girlfriend Deedee is cheating with her brother.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: DNA: Messy Family Drama / Unlock The Truth: Did You Steal My Money?
programme.desc: Markeila says that Darrell abandoned her while she was 6 months pregnant with her daughter. He relocated to another state and had a child with another woman! Plus, Chloe says her Aunt Sabrena is a thief who stole her food stamp card.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: DNA Mystery: Was My Dead Mother Right?
programme.desc: Marshall doesn’t have any biological children, so he thought. But a DNA test result could change it all.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: If You Want More Kids….I Want A Ring / Unlock: 21-Year Marriage On The Rocks
programme.desc: Taniah gave her boyfriend Rome three children and now she wants a ring. Then, Penny believes that her sister, Tracey, is married to a no-good cheater named Richard. Penny and Tracey have the proof, but Richard insists that he’s not cheating.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Mom Calls Me Pure Evil; Before We Get Married, Is He My Son?
programme.desc: Mia confronts her mother, Gwennie, regarding the 17 years of abuse she's endured; Caleb questions whether he's the father of his fiancée Mahogany's child after seeing footage of another man driving his car with Mahogany.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Mom, Why? / Unlock The Phone: Stop Cheating
programme.desc: Kwane needs help her with her mommy issues. She says her mother dealt in drugs, alcohol, and sex work.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Help, My Daughter Has a Shopping Addiction; My Chosen Father Rejected Me; Unlock the Phone: Enough Lies!
programme.desc: Lisa fears that her daughter is in denial regarding her shopping addiction; Brooklyn and her friend Kevyn ended their familial relationship badly; Oladean says his wife left him once he revealed he was sick with cancer, but she says he is a fraud.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: DNA Mystery: Are You My Cousin Or My Father
programme.desc: At first, Neshay thought Michael was her cousin, but it turns out that he could possibly be her father.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: DNA: Even If You’re My Sister, I Hate You
programme.desc: On today’s Karamo, Davionne has gone nearly three decades without knowing who her biological father is. See if Davionne’s search comes to an end, today!

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Couple In Crisis: You Won't Touch Me / Unlock: Is My Daughter's Girlfriend The Problem?
programme.desc: Antoinette stands by husband Duane despite infidelity. Karamo intervenes to salvage their rocky relationship. Also, Lacy seeks help for daughter Regan's toxic engagement on Karamo.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Did My Mom Trade Me for Drugs? Part 1
programme.desc: Lex is about to meet her mother for the first time. Lex wants to know why she was abandoned as a child.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.desc: Ronesha is an aggrieved mother who claims that her daughter has been nothing but trouble since the pandemic.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Dad, Did You Ever Love Me?; Unlock: Who's Your Sidepiece?
programme.desc: Takyah says her father has treated her like an outsider all of her life but places her half-sister, Shatera, on a pedestal; Ramona says she thought she was doing the right thing when she allowed her boyfriend, Miguel, to entertain a side piece.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: My Best Friend Stole from Me / Unlock The Phone: 20 Years of Lies?
programme.desc: Jazmin and Erica have been besties for years! But things took a turn when Jazmin’s swimwear went MIA.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Stop Spending My Money at the Strip Club
programme.desc: Aaliyah loves her man but had to put him on probation when she found out that he was cheating with strippers!

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: 39-Year-Old DNA Secret...but Did Dad Already Know?
programme.desc: Abdul's determined to solve a 40-year DNA puzzle, finding Michael, his alleged father. Now, he's confident the search ends, but Tomeika doubts the story.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock The Phone Has Shocking Surprise
programme.desc: Karamo dives in to help Kenny and Nichole with their lingering issues after knowing each other for decades.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: DNA: Mom, Stop Denying -- He's My Dad!; Unlock: She Says She's Your Girlfriend!
programme.desc: Laecie has no idea who her father is but hopes that it is Kevan; Kay wants to marry Johnnie but received a call from another woman claiming to be his girlfriend, so she wants Karamo to unlock the truth from Johnnie's phone.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock: 20 Year Friendship Over? / DNA Mystery: Are You My Sister?
programme.desc: Tasha believes that her friend of 20 years, Nae, betrayed her. The two haven’t spoken in over a year and Tasha is convinced that Nae slept with her fiancé. Next, Victoria says her life changed for the better when she discovered that she had a sister.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlocking My Phone…But You Have A Mistress
programme.desc: Angel believed her relationship was fine until she heard that her man was messing around with a young woman.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock: You Texted 39 Women?!?; Mom, I'm Battling to Be Heard!
programme.desc: Domonique is upset after catching her boyfriend Christopher texting other women and changing the phone password. Sarah wants to mend her relationship with her mother, Tonya, but years of abuse and neglect have led to a breaking point.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock: Prove That You're Not Cheating with my Cousin
programme.desc: Sylvia thinks her cousin dresses very provocatively and based on their transgressions, is very suspicious.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock: You're Letting A Man Come Between Us
programme.desc: On Karamo, Zee says the relationship with her bestie, Bree, has been shattered. Zee blames Bree’s boyfriend, Daquan, for all the dissension in their friendship. Both Daquan and Bree claim that Zee has betrayed them and is not a loyal friend.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Help! My Daughter Is Naked On The Internet / DNA: Someone Else Was In My Bed!
programme.desc: Kristie is shocked by a video of Erica and her boyfriend, Cullen, while Erica resents her interference; Jamaine, suspicious of Alicia's fidelity, doubts he's the father of her son.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.desc: After a night of too much drinking, Ro Ro claims that $384 of her money went MIA.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Stop Gaslighting Me and Unlock Your Phone
programme.desc: Quandra believes that her sister Deidra’s fiancé Jamar, is a cheating and manipulative liar!

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: DNA: Who Do I Belong To? / Mom, You Pressure Me Too Much!
programme.desc: Keisha grew up in foster care and has been searching for her parents ever since she was 18. Next, Bianca wants to know when enough is enough as she’s provided her daughter, Nola, everything to be successful.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: My Sister Is My Bully / DNA: Boyfriend Or Husband's Baby?
programme.desc: On today’s Karamo, Nyah says she and other members of the family have been bullied and tormented by her older sister, Marquisa. Plus, Brandon immediately had doubts on being the father of Tiffany’s baby.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Mom, Give Me Back My Son! / DNA & Unlock: Why Don't You Trust Me?
programme.desc: Today on Karamo, Trinity says her mother, Sabrina, gave her up when she was 5 years old. Next, Tommy says his girlfriend, Cee’Cee, admitted to sleeping with another man which is why he has doubts about being the father to all three of her children.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Ultimatum: Invest In Our Future Or No Baby
programme.desc: Aledia thought Sheilyn was her ride or die until one night, Sheilyn watched her get tossed out of a club.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.desc: After two decades of not knowing her Father, Hope was approached by a man named Tim at a gas station.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.desc: After two decades of not knowing her Father, Hope was approached by a man named Tim at a gas station.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Will A Dna Test Reveal My True Identity? Will This Friendship Survive?
programme.desc: Tyawana seeks to solve a DNA mystery involving Roger and Gerald as potential fathers, spanning three decades. Jayshana and ex-manager Lanae clash over a failed business deal, straining their friendship-turned-business relationship.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: DNA: I Took the Wrong Baby Home; Unlock: Broken Phone and Promises
programme.desc: Raylene believes that her real daughter was switched at birth and that Undrea isn't hers; Servilia says her fiancé, I'sun, is spending too much time at the bus stop meeting women, and she's caught him sexting other women.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: I Brought the Divorce Papers; My Mom Doesn't Love Me
programme.desc: Shaun believes that Rocky has emotionally abandoned her and is cheating on her; Karamo tries to get a mother and daughter's troubled relationship back on track.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock: My Man And Bestie Together? / Unlock: "Nothing Worth Coming Home For"
programme.desc: Much to Malaysia’s dismay, her boyfriend routinely talks to other women on social media. Then, Keiana is constantly fighting with her boyfriend about his cheating ways. He admits to his cheating ways in the past but claims he's an all true man now.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock The Truth: Did You Break In? / She’s My Daughter...Not Yours!
programme.desc: On Karamo, Bridgette caught her ex, Donnie, on the couch naked after being with another woman. Plus, Naiya says she helped raise her friend Mya’s daughter. But now that Mya has a new man, Naiya believes she’s been cast aside.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.desc: Trevor and his wife are no strangers to reality television. But Trevor says she's taken things too far.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.desc: Brietta reached out to the show to help her decide on whether to stay or not after finding Kertis cheating.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: To See Your Grandson...Stop Bullying Me
programme.desc: Anissa says Nate rescued her from an untenable situation and more importantly believes he is her father.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: I Want a Family, Marry Me/ Unlock The Phone: Give Me a Title
programme.desc: Tray discovered some inappropriate text messages between his girlfriend, Olivia, and other men from her past.

programme.title: Maury
programme.sub-title: The DNA Test Will Prove You Have 12 Kids!
programme.desc: On today's exciting episode of MAURY! The DNA results are packing a punch! These denying dads say there's no way they're the father of these kids. But these morn's are sick and tired of being denied the support they deserve. They say these kids deserve real fathers who know how to take responsibility. But after the results are read, will their paternity search be over, or just beginning?

programme.title: Maury
programme.sub-title: The DNA Tests Will Prove I Do Not Have 18 Kids!
programme.desc: Today in part 1, you'll see shocking stories of dads in denial and baby-mama drama. Some secrets will be revealed but others will have to wait until tomorrow's shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Maury
programme.sub-title: I'm Only 16 ... I'll Prove Your Boyfriend Is My Baby's Dad!
programme.desc: 16 year old Shanetta is here to prove to Ken Ken that he is the father of her child. Will he finally own up to his responsibilities? Then, Megan has already tested Kayton for one child, now she's back to test him again for her 2nd baby.

programme.title: Maury
programme.sub-title: The DNA Results Are In...Are These 3 Kids Mine?
programme.desc: Takeea previously brought fiancé Brent here to prove his fidelity. Now they’re back so she can prove her fidelity and her child’s paternity! Then, Maryanne’s fiancé Dooger denies their 3 kids, but who will be right after the test results come out?

programme.title: Maury
programme.sub-title: Is My Fiance The Father of My Sister's Babies?
programme.desc: Jemar and his mother completely deny Jamar's child. But when the DNA results are revealed, will Jemar go running to mommy? Then, Jessica is desperate to find the father of her son. But will the DNA results give her the closure she needs or just searching for more answers? Plus, Talia is here to prove that her brother is the father of Megan's son.

programme.title: Maury
programme.sub-title: I Found Panties and a Hair Weave ... Are You Cheating?
programme.desc: Nakeeta wants to uncover her fiance's past; Jessica fears that she has sacrificed everything for a scam artist; Tiffany regrets dumping her new husband for her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Maury
programme.sub-title: If Her Baby is Yours ... Our Marriage Is Over!
programme.desc: It's more paternity drama and relationships are hanging in the balance! Maury's here with all the paternity test action that you crave, but will these results be music to these mother's ears or something out of their worst nightmares?

programme.title: Maury
programme.sub-title: The Test Will Tell .. Do I Have 4 Babies with 4 Women?
programme.desc: These women swear they know who the real father of their children is. But these denying dads say that they are barking up the wrong paternity tree.

programme.title: Maury
programme.sub-title: Test Them! Is My Fiance Sleeping With My Mom?
programme.desc: These women demand to know the truth about their lovers whom they've accused of cheating. They suspect their men of being unfaithful and have brought them here to take Maury's lie detector test. But when the results are read, will these men be vindicated or caught red handed.

programme.title: Maury
programme.sub-title: 34 Men... Is One Of Them The Father?
programme.desc: Shawn has been searching for her son's father for years, and now she's testing the fifth man, Mike. Then, Tommy's fiance cheated with 8 guys and now he denies her new baby.

programme.title: Maury
programme.sub-title: I'm 19 ... Is My Mom Sleeping With My Boyfriend?
programme.desc: Sarah suspects Brian's secret online sex life. Enisha fears Larry's infidelity due to their age gap. Melissa questions Marcus' fidelity during her pregnancy.

programme.title: Maury
programme.sub-title: The Proof is on Video...Stop Denying You're a Cheater!
programme.desc: Ashley found a pair of her cousin’s panties in her man’s gym bag and photos of them in a club. Plus, Brandy has been collecting evidence that her man cheats. Are her suspicions all in her head? Sex secrets uncovered on today’s Maury!

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Anissa Williams sues her dad, Nathaniel Green, for $5,000, claiming he owes her money despite the heartbreak. Nathaniel argues the money was family kindness and countersues for $1,000 for slander.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Raoul Lopez sues ex Jessica Melendy for $5,000, claiming she stole his car and refuses to return it. Jessica argues he gave it to her willingly and countersues for $4,299.03, citing expenses during their relationship.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Nicholas Grassa sues Merri Phillips for $145 in extra labor costs after a power steering pump he bought was deemed defective by his mechanic. Merri claims the pump was in perfect condition and blames the mechanic's skills.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Nancy Moses Hill sues Tracy Jordan for $5,000, claiming Tracy kept too much money from selling her family's antiques. Tracy argues she followed the contract and paid what was due. Nancy insists her elderly mother’s cherished items were undervalued.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Llewellyn Clark sues ex-girlfriend Tyronica Munn for $1,400, claiming she stole it after a fight. Tyronica says she spent it on a hotel, champagne, and a massage, asserting the money was owed since Llewellyn freeloaded in her apartment.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Antoine Grice sues landlord Nicholas Renzi for $868, claiming the apartment was unlivable and his security deposit was unfairly withheld. Renzi counters that Antoine was a troublesome tenant who overstayed.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Mary sues Theresa for $5,000, claiming she stole her three beloved dogs. Theresa says Mary gave them away after losing her home and refuses to return them or pay. It's a heartbroken owner versus a "kindhearted" caretaker in this canine battle.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Sisters At War...Is It Mom's Fault?
programme.desc: Ladonna is desperate to fix her relationship with her older sister Taunja once and for all.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock: Give the Key Back!; Unlock: Broken Phone & Promises
programme.desc: Jackie Juicy's ex has the keys to her house, and her current fiancé isn't happy about it; Servilla thinks her boyfriend, I'Sun, is spending too much time trying to meet and sexting women instead of paying off the engagement ring he put on layaway.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: DNA: I Took the Wrong Baby Home; Unlock: Broken Phone and Promises
programme.desc: Raylene believes that her real daughter was switched at birth and that Undrea isn't hers; Servilia says her fiancé, I'sun, is spending too much time at the bus stop meeting women, and she's caught him sexting other women.

programme.desc: Ozzy releases his first solo album in six years.

programme.desc: Ozzy is working out with a personal trainer in preparation for an upcoming tour.

programme.desc: Ozzy is touring while Sharon returns home, planning to reunite with Ozzy in Houston because she misses him.

programme.desc: Ozzy mixes alcohol with the pain medication for his foot injury and winds up stoned.
